languages.text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
languages.original_text: Это существо чувствует поддержку стаи. Нанесение ему {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g} не заставит его искать укрытие.

traits.locale_text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

languages.text: Это существо чувствует поддержку стаи. Нанесение ему {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g} не заставит его искать укрытие.
languages.original_text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Это существо чувствует поддержку стаи. Нанесение ему {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g} не заставит его искать укрытие.

languages.text: 巣族に支えられ、この生物は恐れを知らなくなる。{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を受けても隠れない。
languages.original_text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 巣族に支えられ、この生物は恐れを知らなくなる。ダメージを受けても隠れない。

languages.text: 此生物获得了虫群的支持，变得无所畏惧。即便受到{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}也不会躲藏。
languages.original_text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 此生物获得了虫群的支持，变得无所畏惧。即便受到伤害也不会躲藏。

languages.text: Con el apoyo de la progenie, esta criatura no conoce el miedo. No se esconderá aunque sufra {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daños{/g}.
languages.original_text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Con el apoyo de la progenie, esta criatura no conoce el miedo. No se esconderá aunque sufra daños.

languages.text: Durch den Rückhalt der Rotte verliert diese Kreatur jede Angst. Sie versteckt sich auch dann nicht, {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} zugefügt wird.
languages.original_text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Durch den Rückhalt der Rotte verliert diese Kreatur jede Angst. Sie versteckt sich nicht, selbst wenn ihr Schaden zugefügt wird.

languages.text: Soutenue par le couvain, cette créature n'a peur de rien. Elle ne se cache pas même si elle subit des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g}.
languages.original_text: Supported by the brood, this creature becomes fearless. It will not hide even if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Soutenue par le couvain, cette créature n'a peur de rien. Elle ne se cache pas même si elle subit des dégâts.

languages.text: Sürüsü tarafından desteklenen bu yaratık korkusuz hâle gelir. {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Hasar{/g} alsa bile saklanmayacak.

traits.locale_text: Sürüsü tarafından desteklenen bu yaratık korkusuz hâle gelir. {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Hasar{/g} alsa bile saklanmayacak.
